title: iDisco Immunolabeling in Brown Adipose Tissue (BAT)
author: Seoeun Lee
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.wqmfdu6
materials: The cleared sample should be tranferred to a chamber of an appropriate size (we create one with a 3D printer), sealed on a coverglass with Kwik-sil epoxy (VWR). This chamber is then mounted on Attofluor cell chamber (Thermofisher A7816) and filled with DBE

steps.title: Anesthetize the mouse, perfuse with 20ml...
steps.instruction: Anesthetize the mouse, perfuse with 20ml Saline and 4% PFA in 0.1M PB

steps.title: Dissect BAT, carefully remove white adipose tissue surrounding the BAT
steps.instruction: Dissect BAT, carefully remove white adipose tissue surrounding the BAT. The two bilateral depots can be left connected or separated, as desired

steps.title: Fix in 4% PFA in 0
steps.instruction: Fix in 4% PFA in 0.1M PB at 4°C, overnight with shaking, then RT 1h

steps.title: Wash in PBS with shaking
steps.instruction: Wash in PBS with shaking: RT 30min x 3times

steps.title: Dehydrate with methanol/H2O series
steps.instruction: Dehydrate with methanol/H2O series: 20%, 40%, 60%, 80%, 100%; at RT for 1h each with shaking

steps.title: Wash further with 100% methanol for...
steps.instruction: Wash further with 100% methanol for 1h at RT and then chill the sample at 4°C with shaking

steps.title: Overnight incubation, with shaking, in 66%...
steps.instruction: Overnight incubation, with shaking, in 66% DCM / 33% methanol / 1% deionized water at RT

steps.title: Wash twice in 100% methanol at...
steps.instruction: Wash twice in 100% methanol at RT with shaking, and then chill the sample at 4°C

steps.title: Bleach in chilled fresh 5% H...
steps.instruction: Bleach in chilled fresh 5% H 2 O 2 in methanol (1 volume 30% H 2 O 2 to 5 volumes MeOH), overnight at 4°C with shaking

steps.title: Rehydrate with methanol/H2O series
steps.instruction: Rehydrate with methanol/H2O series: 80%, 60%, 40%, 20%, PBS; 1h each at RT with shaking

steps.title: Wash in PTx
steps.instruction: Wash in PTx.2 (0.2% TritonX-100 in PBS) for 1h x2 at RT with shaking

steps.title: Incubate samples in Permeabilization Solution (40ml PTx
steps.instruction: Incubate samples in Permeabilization Solution (40ml PTx.2 + 10ml DMSO + 1.15g glycine), at 37°C with shaking for 2 days

steps.title: Block in Blocking Solution (42ml PT2
steps.instruction: Block in Blocking Solution (42ml PT2.x + 3ml Donkey Serum + 5ml DMSO) at 37°C with shaking for 2 days

steps.title: Incubate with primary antibody in PTwH (0
steps.instruction: Incubate with primary antibody in PTwH (0.2% Tween-20 in PBS + 0.1% of 10mg/ml Heparin stock solution in PBS)/5%DMSO/3% Donkey Serum, at 37°C with shaking for 7 days *Validated primary antibodies - Beta 3 tubulin (Abcam ab18207. 1:400 dilution) - Tyrosine Hydroxylase (Millipore AB152, 1:400 dilution) - Pgp9.5 (Abcam ab108986, 1:400 dilution)

steps.title: Wash in PTwH for 4-5 times...
steps.instruction: Wash in PTwH for 4-5 times (1-2 hours each) until the next day at RT with shaking

steps.title: Incubate with secondary antibody in PTwH/3%...
steps.instruction: Incubate with secondary antibody in PTwH/3% Donkey Serum, at 37°C with shaking for 7 days - Centrifue secondary antibody at 20000g for 10 minutes before use - Use Amber tube from this step forward - Wavelength longer than 555 (ex. AF555, AF647) is recommended

steps.title: Wash in PTwH for 4-5 times...
steps.instruction: Wash in PTwH for 4-5 times (1-2 hours each) until the next day at RT with shaking

steps.title: Dehydrate with methanol/H2O series
steps.instruction: Dehydrate with methanol/H2O series: 20%, 40%, 60%, 80%, 100%; at RT for 1h each with shaking. Ption to leave onernight at this point, is desired

steps.title: 3h incubation with shaking, in 66%...
steps.instruction: 3h incubation with shaking, in 66% DCM / 33% methanol / 1% deionized water at RT

steps.title: Incubate in 100% DCM for 15...
steps.instruction: Incubate in 100% DCM for 15 minutes twice at RT with shaking to wash the methanol

steps.title: Incubate in DiBenzyl Ether (no shaking)
steps.instruction: Incubate in DiBenzyl Ether (no shaking). The tube should be filled almost completely with DBE to prevent the air from oxidizing the sample. Before imaging, invert the tube a couple of time to finish mixing the solution

steps.title: We typically use a Nikon Ti...
steps.instruction: We typically use a Nikon Ti Eclipse inverted microscope for scanning confocal microscopy, but a resonance scanner is recommended for faster imaging
